ink.usage: Primary dark surface, headers, hero backgrounds

mono.usage: Report IDs, timestamps, category tags, data

motif.name: status stamp
motif.description: A rotated, outlined badge (see components/StatusStamp.tsx) that carries an issue's real review status — PENDING REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED, POSSIBLE DUPLICATE, RESOLVED. Reused across the app, the marketing deck, and the logo mark itself.
